Author: faxmachine1
Content:
Hello @Kippy and @hey ; I am thrilled to see that this server is under new management! This "new chapter" seems promising. I am not sure if you have been a part of this server before the decline in players- I'd like to point out a few flaws that contributed to the server's lack of success.

First and foremost: both @siqns and @Egono were immature and did not take any seriousness in the server's management, nor did the developer(s) (as you may know, Kundaliel and his outburst exemplified this). In order to maintain an active and respectable player base, you need to return the same respect that you would want from your own community. This seems like a give-in, but you would be surprised to know the amount of servers that I have seen fail from this very reason.

Secondly, the community engagement was never consistently high. While there was an occasional event hosted once in a while, a large portion of them were spontaneous and weren't given any advance- this meant less players were actually able to plan around it and participate, which meant a less entertaining event all around.

Thirdly, there was a lack of management for the staff team. There were (and still are) many unqualified staff, some being in high-ranking positions that risk the integrity of both the Discord and Minecraft fronts of the server. I think a way to solve this would be to appoint a specific, one-person role dedicated to managing the staff applications and promotions- if you'd like, you could also have a checks-and-balances system in which the owners approve/deny decisions made by this staff manager. This would increase the efficiency of the staff progression, which would keep the staff members engaged and constantly working towards an achievable goal, while simultaneously weeding out the weak or underqualified staff.

I believe that this server could be moving in a great direction- just with a few tweaks and changes. DM me for more!
